intro: Fenerivia angustielliptica, also known as a species of plant in the family Annonaceae, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the rainforests of Papua New Guinea. The health benefits of Fenerivia angustielliptica include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of this plant include lignans, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. Fenerivia angustielliptica is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever and respiratory issues.
